description_long: This is a rectangular woven handbag featuring alternating horizontal bands of natural beige and vibrant blue-green hues. The body of the bag is structured with a tightly interlaced wicker or synthetic rattan material, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. Two rounded handles, also woven, are attached at the top, allowing for easy carrying by hand or over the forearm. The bag's surface is smooth with a subtle texture from the weaving, and the color bands create a visually striking, summery look. There are no visible external pockets, closures, or decorative hardware, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. The interior is not visible, but it is likely spacious and unlined or simply lined for carrying personal items.
description: A rectangular woven handbag with beige and blue-green horizontal stripes, featuring two rounded woven handles and a minimalist, summery design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the handbag with alternating beige and blue-green horizontal stripes and both handles visible.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the slim depth of the handbag and the continuation of the striped pattern along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, displaying the same striped pattern and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view, again showing the narrow depth and the edge of the woven pattern.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded woven handles, non-adjustable, attached at the top on either side of the opening.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; the top appears to remain open.
attribute_pattern: Horizontal stripes in alternating beige and blue-green bands.
